artifact.source:

  <LogStream file="logs/app.log" groupBy="10m" match="ERROR" kind="bar" title="ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket" height="360" />

toolInput.title: Chart the error rate over time from a log file on disk

failureReasons: content-non-empty: expected >=200 visible chars and >=120px of painted content, observed 123 chars and 876px — "ERROR rate over time app.log bucketed into 10-minute windows ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket 09:00 09:10 09:20 09:30 09:40 09:50 0 3 6 9 12 0 1 5 11 4 1"

artifact.source:
<Card title="ERROR rate over time" description="app.log bucketed into 10-minute windows" maxWidth="lg" centered="true">
  <LogStream file="logs/app.log" groupBy="10m" match="ERROR" kind="bar" title="ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket" height="360" />
  <Text variant="body">Across the one-hour window captured in app.log, 22 ERROR lines were logged out of 100 total lines. Errors were clustered mid-window: the 09:30 bucket had the highest count at 11 ERROR lines, following a ramp-up from 1 at 09:10 and 5 at 09:20, then tapering back down to 4 at 09:40 and 1 at 09:50. No errors were logged in the first ten minutes (09:00).</Text>
</Card>

Errors were clustered mid-window: the 09:30 bucket had the highest count at 11 ERROR lines, following a ramp-up from 1 at 09:10 and 5 at 09:20, then tapering back down to 4 at 09:40 and 1 at 09:50.
